name: sleeplessness
title: best herbal teas for sleeplessness
description: Vitex agnus-castus tea contains bioactive constituents such as flavonoids, phenolic acids, and iridoids, which are known to possess sedative and sleep-promoting properties. The tea's anti-anxiety and adaptogenic properties help to regulate the body's hormonal balance, alleviate stress, and promote relaxation, making it an effective remedy for treating sleeplessness.
